title: Codex Remote Compaction V2 Continuity
problem: Codex remote_compaction_v2 is sent as ordinary /responses with compaction_trigger, so the proxy currently cannot classify, log, or apply compact continuity semantics to it.
gates: cargo nextest run -p codex-helper-core remote_compaction_v2 request_logs --no-fail-fast
cargo nextest run -p codex-helper-core remote_compaction_v2 route_affinity --no-fail-fast
cargo nextest run -p codex-helper-core responses_compact route_affinity --no-fail-fast

continue_policy.notes: Core target complete. Future work should open a new lane for explicit continuity-domain support or v2 live-smoke diagnostics.
